observation: Score continues rising (43.8→44.2) despite market stabilization. P_055/P_083 maintain 10%+ levels. External trigger (Iran war) easing but domestic stress persisting through household debt crisis.

2026 global macro alignment: US-Venezuela invasion (1/3) precedent → weakened deterrence → China Taiwan invasion probability rising (6% to 11% on prediction markets). Korea caught between energy dependency (Hormuz 98%) + semiconductor exposure (Taiwan risk) + household debt bomb. P_055/P_083 persistence reflects this triple threat pricing.

PLA activity around Taiwan dropped sharply: 460 flights YTD (-46.5% YoY), zero flights Feb 28-Mar 8. Unprecedented PLA purge affecting operational capacity. Pattern matches pre-strike calm before Iran war.

Trump approval -13.0% net (36-38%) but S&P500 +20.3% since election. Stock ownership divide: investors positive, non-investors (62%) negative. Market driven by AI spending ($700B), not Trump policies. February job losses -92,000
한국의 구조적 3중 취약성: 1) 에너지 수입 98% 의존(호르무즈 경유 276만 배럴/일), 2) 반도체가 수출 20%/이익 70% 차지(대만 장비/소재 의존), 3) 가계부채 1인당 9,739만원(GDP 대비 역대 최고). 이 세 요소가 상호 증폭하며 외부 충격 시 시스템 붕괴 가속화
